aprsd_mqtt_plugin.aprsd_mqtt_plugin module

class aprsd_mqtt_plugin.aprsd_mqtt_plugin.MQTTPlugin[source]

Bases: APRSDPluginBase

client = None
enabled = False
filter(packet)[source]
Parameters:

packet (Packet)

on_connect(client, userdata, flags, rc)[source]
on_disconnect(client, userdata, rc)[source]
on_publish(client, userdata, mid)[source]
process(packet)[source]

This is called when the filter passes.

Parameters:

packet (Packet)

setup()[source]

Allows the plugin to do some ‘setup’ type checks in here.

If the setup checks fail, set the self.enabled = False. This will prevent the plugin from being called when packets are received.
